diff:
diff --git a/src/settings.py b/src/settings.py
index f1daf8d..550f21f 100644
--- a/src/settings.py
+++ b/src/settings.py
@@ -2,7 +2,15 @@ DEFAULT_ENDPOINT = "https://api.example.com"
 
 
 def load_endpoint(env, explicit=None):
-    raw = env.get("APP_ENDPOINT", explicit or DEFAULT_ENDPOINT)
+    if explicit is not None:
+        raw = explicit
+    else:
+        raw = env.get("APP_ENDPOINT", DEFAULT_ENDPOINT)
+    
+    # Normalize whitespace-only values to None
+    if raw is not None and raw.strip() == "":
+        raw = None
+        
     if not raw:
         return DEFAULT_ENDPOINT
     return raw.rstrip("/")
